steps.title: Identify variables
steps.content:
The variable x represents minutes Jordan spends stretching each day, and y represents minutes Jordan spends walking each day.
The given equation is $$x + y = 90$$.

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content:
Since the left side adds the minutes for both activities, the constant 90 must be the total minutes spent stretching and walking each day.
That confirms C is correct.
